instructions: 1. With the mixer until it comes to the snacks of the butter and cheese cream, freak
2. Add sugar, vanilla, salt, flour and almond.
3. Make a soft dough i&ccedil that does not stick to the hands.
4. Turn the dough into rolls and stretch stretch wrap push into the movie and leave it in the deep Freezer of 40 minutes.
5. Pulp stretch separation from the moviehoterine egg white creep.
6. Blend Walnut, Antep nuts and sugar and smear around the dough.
8. slice 5 cm thickness and cook 18-20 minutes in the oven, which is set to the oiled paper-series tray and 180 degrees.
9. From the oven let it cool and cool.
10. Serve.

lagana-argiro.name: Lagana

ingredients.item: 1 yeast sachet dry (or 1 Cube 25 g fresh)
50 ml olive oil or sunflower oil
1 yeast sachet dry (or 1 Cube 25 g fresh)
50 ml olive oil or sunflower oil

instructions: Dissolve the yeast in a small bowl with some of the sugar and some of the lukewarm water. Allow for 5 minutes until the surface is turned on and foamed.
Dissolve the salt in the remaining lukewarm water. We keep 3 tabletspoons of total oil asside.
In a large bowl, add the flower and open a pothole in the middle.
Add the activated yeast, the water (be careful not to be hot) and the remaining oil. Mix with a seed until the dough is collected in a ball.

Flour or oil the hands lightly and knead for a few minutes. Transfer the dough to the counter and continue the dough, pulling and folding the dough with your hands closed in fists, so that it holds air.
The dough must be soft and supple. The more we work on her, the more fluffy she gets. Form it into a ball with the components downloads and add it to oiled bowls.
Cover and allow to rise for 1 hour and 30 minutes, until double in volume. If we are in a Hurry, place it in a warm place or in a lukewarm ocean.
Gentle deflate the dough and divide it into 2 equal parts. With oily hands we open each piece in a oily baking pan, giving it the desired shape.
Brush the surface with some water, sprinkle a lot of sesame and gently press the palms to stick. Repeat for the second part.

Cover with clear towel and allow them to rise again for 30–45 minutes. With the fingertips we make deep fingers or pierce the surface with a knitting needle or souvli until it reaches the bottom of the baking pan.
Bake in a well preheated oven in the air for about 30 minutes. To the end of the baking spray lightly with water to city.
Remove the hot pies and leave them on a grill or on a clean towel to remove animation and remain crispy.

lasagna-recipe-in-a-pot-lezzet.name: Lasagna Recipe In A Pot

ingredients.item: Onion can be used in a barley onions or pricks.
Carrot you can add zucchini or sweet potatoes instead.
You can use milky flour sauce for a light recipe.
Without cream, a vegan alternative to milk or peel milk you can prepare with.
Olive oil or margarine can be used instead of butter.
Pay internal direct without being cooked; you can cook in “haz lazanya leaves” prefer.
You can add snacks to thyme, feslene or fresh pepper.

instructions: 1. Warm a pot in medium fire and add into olive oil.
2. Take the thin chopped onions in the pot and roast the onions to light-and-gray; until softening and transparent.
3. Add the caviar you reindeed with the thin side of the rein, and mix with onions, soak minutes.
4. Add fine chopped garlic and reveal aromas & mix up to your taste.
5. Small parch add stalks and butter into the pot.
6. Roast until the mushrooms are mildly softened.
7. Add fresh peppers and mix several rounds.
8. Take the chopped pot, taste salt and pepper, and cook until the colour area by crushing the mink.
9. Add grated tomatoes, add salt, pepper and powder sugar, and combine the aromas of sauce in jealous fire.
10. Place the obstacles in the way that the leaves of lazanya will be accompanied by long edges.

15. Serve hot and offer with fresh green or salad as you want.

laurie-osteens-coconut-cake.name: Laurie Osteen's Coconut Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Coat cake pans with nonstick spray. Dust with flour, tapping out excess.
Whisk cake mix, eggs, oil, and 1 cup milk in a large bowl until no lumps remain. Divide batter evenly among prepared pans; smooth tops.
Bake cakes until a tester inserted into the centers comes out clean, 10-15 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix coconut, sugar, sour cream, salt, and remaining 1 tablespoon milk in a medium bowl to combine; set frosting aside.

Transfer pans to wire racks; let cool 5 minutes. Turn cakes out onto racks and spread frosting over tops of warm cakes, dividing evenly. Stack cakes. Let stand at room temperature, covered with a cake dome, or loosely tented with foil, at least 4 hours before serving.
DO AHEAD: Cake can be made 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

law-bok-gow-chinese-turnip-cake.name: Law Bok Gow (chinese Turnip Cake)

ingredients.prep: peeled and finely grated on a box grater
white and light green parts only, chopped
leaves and tender stems only, chopped

instructions: Place dried shiitakes in a heatproof bowl and pour over enough hot water to cover. Soak until rehydrated and plump, about 30 minutes. Drain mushrooms, rinse under cold running water, and squeeze out excess water. Trim and discard stems and dice caps.

Set a large pot, Dutch oven, or wok over medium heat and add grated daikon and 1/4 cup (60ml) water. Bring to a simmer, cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until daikon is slightly translucent, about 20 minutes. Stir in 1 tablespoon brown sugar until dissolved. Transfer everything to a bowl and set aside. Wipe Dutch oven or wok clean.

In the same Dutch oven or wok, add diced shiitakes, bacon, sausage, and dried shrimp. Cook, stirring, until bacon and sausage have rendered some fat, about 5 to 7 minutes. Add remaining 2 teaspoons brown sugar and the soy sauce and cook, stirring often, until liquid is evaporated, about 1 minute longer. Transfer everything to a bowl with the cooked daikon.

Add rice flour in thirds to the daikon mixture, mixing thoroughly between additions (make sure no traces of flour are left at the bottom). If flour mixture becomes too difficult to stir, stir in up to 2 tablespoons (30ml) water to loosen slightly; the final texture should be sticky and the mixture will be somewhat loose.

Scrape mixture into two 7- by 5-inch baking dishes (greased with cooking spray) or disposable aluminum baking trays. Set up a steamer large enough to hold one of the baking dishes, then, working 1 baking dish at a time, steam turnip cake until cooked through, 25 to 30 minutes. Repeat with remaining baking dish. Let cooked turnip cakes rest 20 minutes. Loosen the sides with an offset spatula or butter knife and turn it out onto a cutting board. Slice each cake into 9 even squares.
Heat a large nonstick with 1 tablespoon oil over medium heat. Add cakes; cook, undisturbed, until golden brown and crisp, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to a platter.
Drizzle turnip cakes with sesame oil and top with chopped scallions, cilantro, and sesame oil, if using. Slice and serve with hoisin sauce and/or Sriracha on the side.

leche-flan.name: Leche Flan
instructions: Combine sugar and water in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Bring to a boil without stirring to avoid the mixture crystallizing. Continue to boil, swirling the pan occasionally, until sugar syrup begins to brown, 7 to 10 minutes. Reduce the heat to medium low and watch the color.
Once the caramel is a deep brown, 2 to 3 minutes, immediately pour it into a 10-inch flan mold. Carefully tilt the mold to make sure the whole bottom surface is covered.
Combine evaporated milk, condensed milk, egg yolks, and vanilla extract in a large bowl. Stir lightly to prevent bubbles or foam from forming; strain batter.

Place a roasting pan large enough to hold the flan mold on the oven rack. Fold two 32-inch long sheets of foil lengthwise in quarters to make strips. Cross the strips and place the flan mold in the roasting pan, with the ends of the strips extending over the edges of the roasting pan. Crimp ends slightly to keep them in place.
Slowly pour the custard mixture into the caramel-lined flan mold.
Add enough hot water to the roasting pan to come halfway up the side of the mold. Cover the roasting pan with aluminum foil.

Bake in the preheated oven until firm and a knife inserted near the center comes out clean, about 1 hour. Carefully remove the roasting pan from the oven. Carefully remove the flan mold from the roasting pan using the foil strips. Let cool on a wire rack, about 1 hour. Cover and chill in the refrigerator until completely cool, at least 4 hours or overnight.

Run a paring knife around the edges of the flan. Cover the mold with a rimmed platter and carefully flip it over to release the flan from the mold for serving. Scrape any excess caramel from the mold over the flan.

leek-velvet-argiro.name: Leek Velvet
instructions: For the leek velvet soup, clean the leeks and cut the white part of them, which is the tenderest, in slices.
We keep some green leaves for the garnish.
Rub the zucchini – only the green part – in a thick grutter.
Add the leeks, pumpkin and broth in a pot. Cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes to soften the leeks.
Then we pulp them with the rod or in the blender. Salt and pepper and sprinkle with the dill.
Cut long stripes from the leads of the leek and sauté them for a few minutes in the olive oil.
Garnish the velvet with the salted leeks and mix with the light cream.

lemon-alfredo-sauce.name: Lemon Alfredo Sauce
instructions: Melt butter in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat. Once butter is foamy, add garlic, pepper, salt, and nutmeg. Cook and stir until garlic is fragrant, about 30 seconds.

Gradually whisk in cream, stirring constantly, to incorporate cream into butter. Drizzle in lemon juice, then add lemon zest, while stirring constantly. Keep stirring until sauce coats the back of a spoon, 3 to 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in grated Pecorino Romano and Parmesan cheeses. Taste and adjust seasoning, if necessary. Serve garnished with parsley.

lemon-cheese.name: Lemon Cheese
instructions: Grate zest of 2 lemons; squeeze juice from 3 lemons.

Melt butter with sugar over very low heat in a double boiler; slowly pour in beaten eggs and lemon juice. Stir lemon zest into butter mixture; stir constantly until mixture is thickened. Remove from heat to cool completely.

lemon-pepper-wings.name: Lemon Pepper Wings

ingredients.prep: drumettes and flats separated, patted dry with paper towels
preferably cayenne-based (such as frank’s or crystal)

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Toss 2½ lb. chicken wings, drumettes and flats separated, patted dry with paper towels, ¼ cup lemon pepper seasoning, 1 Tbsp. English mustard powder, and 1 tsp. sugar in a large bowl until wings are thoroughly and evenly coated. Add ¼ cup cornstarch and 1 Tbsp. baking powder and toss again until evenly coated. Arrange wings in a single layer on a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet, shaking off any excess starch into bowl as you go. Chill, uncovered, at least 15 minutes and up to 1 hour.
Meanwhile, place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 425°.

Drizzle 3 Tbsp. vegetable oil evenly over wings (no need to oil the other side). Bake, rotating baking sheet front to back and turning wings over halfway through, until deep golden brown and crisp, 50–60 minutes.

About 15 minute before wings are done, melt ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add 1 Tbsp. freshly ground pepper and cook just until fragrant, 1–2 minutes. Add ¼ cup fresh lemon juice, 2 Tbsp. hot sauce, preferably cayenne-based, 2½ tsp. garlic powder, 2 tsp. sugar, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and a pinch of MSG (if using) and cook, whisking vigorously, just until emulsified and smooth, about 30 seconds. Remove pan from heat and let sauce cool until thickened slightly, 5–10 minutes.
Transfer wings to a large bowl, drizzle sauce over, and add 2 Tbsp. finely grated lemon zest. Toss until wings are coated. Arrange on a platter or plates to serve.

lemon-pie-with-cookie-argiro.name: Lemon Pie With Cookie
instructions: First, remove the cream from the biscuits and rub the rest of the biscuit into powder.
Place the gelatin with water in a bowl and add it to a ben marie to melt.
Mix until dissolved.
We take the zest and juice from the lemons.
We'll use 20 million ring form for lemon pie with biscuit.
[adrotate banner=”72′′]
Combine the butter with the grated biscuit and mix well.
Place in the pan and freeze the base in the refrigerator for a few minutes.
Disgust cheese with wire or mixer and add the cream from biscuits, sugar confectionery, juice and zest.
Then add the gelatin and pour the cream into the frozen base.
Place the cake in the refrigerator to cool well and decorate with cookies.

lemongrass-basil-sherbet.name: Lemongrass-basil Sherbet
instructions: Heat milk, lemongrass, and cream in a large saucepan over medium heat until mixture almost comes to a boil. Remove from heat and let steep for 20 minutes.

Fill a medium bowl with ice water. Blanch basil leaves in a small pot of boiling water until just wilted, about 10 seconds; immediately transfer to ice water; let cool. Squeeze basil to release excess water.

Strain cream mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a blender. Add basil, sugar, corn syrup, and salt to blender. Purée on high speed until well blended, about 1 minute. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl. Cover and chill until cold, about 4 hours. DO AHEAD: Base for sherbet can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.
Process sherbet in ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions. Transfer to an airtight container, cover, and freeze. DO AHEAD: Sherbet can be made 1 week ahead. Keep frozen.
Scoop into bowls or glasses and serve.

light-lemon-cheesecake-teleculinaria.name: Light Lemon Cheesecake
instructions: Prepare the base: crush the cookies and wrap them with the melted margarine. Add the light and lemon zest to taste, mix well and place on the bottom of a removable ring shape. Alise and reserve in the cold.
Prepare the filling: scrape the gelatin leaves in cold water. Beat the milk condensed with yoghurt, sugar, lemon juice to taste and curd and then wrap the light, beaten in castle.

Drain the gelatin leaves, melt them in the microwave (without boiling) and add them to the previous cream, in thread and stirring well. Lay the cream in shape, smooth it out and take it cold until solidify. When it's time to serve, deform and decorate to taste.

lime-and-lemon-mousse-teleculinaria.name: Lime And Lemon Mousse

ingredients.item: 150 ml juice of 1 lime and 1 lemon

instructions: Put the cornstarch, sugar, 3 yolks (reserve the light), water, and lime and lemon juice in a pot.
Leve o tacho a lume brando e mexendo sempre deixe engrossar. Assim que estiver com a textura de creme junte a manteiga e envolva. Reserve e deixe arrefecer completamente.
Once it's cold add the lime and lemon scrape and wrap.
Bata as claras em castelo e envolva no creme anterior.
Put it in glasses and take it cold for at least 4 hours. Serve nice and fresh, decorated to taste.

lime-ice-cream-teleculinaria.name: Lime Ice Cream

ingredients.item: Raspa de lima e canudos de baunilha com chocolate para decorar

instructions: In a pot, take the condensed milk with cream, powdered milk and the scraping of the limes to the medium. When you are about to boil, remove from the fire and transfer immediately into a bowl.
Quando o preparado estiver frio, junte o sumo das limas e passe por um passador, de forma a eliminar eventuais grumos e a descartar as raspas de lima.
Place it in a container and take it to the freezer until it is very firm. Serve in ball, decorating with lime shaving and vanilla straws with chocolate.

little-wedge-salad-with-sour-cream-dress.name: Little Wedge Salad With Sour Cream Dressing
instructions: Whisk sour cream, mayonnaise, garlic, lemon zest, lemon juice, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl to combine.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Trim root end of lettuce; discard any wilted outer leaves. Cut into quarters lengthwise, then cut each quarter crosswise into 3" pieces. Without separating wedges into leaves, transfer to a large platter. Tuck avocado pieces among lettuce and drizzle lemon juice over; season with salt.
Spoon half of dressing over salad and top with chives; season with pepper. Serve with remaining dressing alongside.

loaded-baked-potato-salad.name: Loaded Baked Potato Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Lightly coat a 9x13-inch baking pan with cooking spray.
Arrange potatoes in prepared baking pan; season with salt and pepper.
Roast potatoes in the preheated oven until easily pierced with a fork, 25 to 35 minutes. Let cool, 10 to 15 minutes.
Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain on paper towels. Crumble into smaller pieces.
Combine 3/4 cup cheese, onion, sour cream, mayonnaise, and most of the chives in a large bowl. Stir in potatoes and crumbled bacon. Garnish with remaining 1/4 cup cheese and chives.
Refrigerate salad 4 hours to overnight before serving.
